arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Lille: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Lille in the Champions League on Tuesday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and live stream and more.

arts.ttl: Lille star set for Liverpool transfer audition as Premier League scouts watch on
arts.sum: Jonathan David is expected to turn down a contract extension at Lille to become a free agent this summer with Liverpool among host of clubs interested in forward

arts.ttl: Liverpool face Champions League surprise package with player scouting department know all about
arts.sum: Lille have been one of the most impressive and unexpected performers in the Champions League this season

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace preparing £15m bid to land Liverpool target
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are reportedly stepping up their efforts to sign Slavia Prague’s highly-rated midfielder, El Hadji Malick Diouf, as they aim to strengthen their squad during the ongoing January transfer window. The Premier League side are looking to bolster their side, and Diouf, who has impressed scouts with his versatility, is seen as an ideal […] The post Crystal Palace preparing £15m bid to land Liverpool target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Are Liverpool best team in world right now?' - MOTD pundits on 'risky' Reds
arts.sum: "A Liverpool blip was put to bed." Gary Lineker, Danny Murphy and Ashley Williams discuss the performance and late goals that saw the Reds win 2-0 at Brentford.

arts.ttl: Lille star Angel Gomes leads England hopefuls looking to impress Thomas Tuchel at Anfield - as flourishing midfielder prepares for Liverpool clash
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: The Manchester United academy product would likely have dreamt about taking on Liverpool at Anfield many times as a boy - but perhaps not in Lille colours.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals extent of Diogo Jota injury ahead of Liverpool's Champions League clash with Lille
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot provides an update on Diogo Jota's injury ahead of Tuesday's Champions Legaue clash with Lille.

arts.ttl: Emmanuel Petit reveals why he still believes Arsenal can overhaul Liverpool in the title race as he locks horns with Jamie Carragher
arts.sum: The Reds' 2-0 victory at Brentford on Saturday, secured after Darwin Nunez's stoppage-time double, saw them extend their gap over Mikel Arteta's side.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah out to equal Samuel Eto'o record as Liverpool chase Champions League history in Lille clash
arts.sum: Liverpool winger Mohamed Salah is aiming to equal a Champions League record set by Samuel Eto'o in Tuesday's home showdown with Lille.
